feed.title: SAP Community - Nora von Thenen
feed.subtitle: Nora von Thenen in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1
entry.content:
Questions are released during or shortly before/after the session. For #CAE1FF - SAP BTP ABAP Environment – How to Build a Multitenancy SaaS Application questions are now available!

Regarding the badges: Thank you for letting us know! We are aware of the badges that do not work and are resolving it. Please do not worry, you will all get your badges and points assigned!

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 4 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content:
The contest is officially closed!

Contest Activities and Points – Awarded and accumulated against your SAP Community ID logged into SAP Groups. 

Welcome to the last and fourth week of Devtoberfest 2023! Until October 15th you can take part in the Devtoberfest contest (CONTEST OFFICIAL RULES HERE) and collect points for tutorials, quizzes and live sessions! Collect as many points as possible and qualify for prizes such as E-Books, a call with Jürgen Müller, a trip to California and many more! To celebrate your registration to Devtoberfest 2023 and TechEd 2023, SAP plants a tree for every participant signing up for both! For general information check out the overview about taking part in the contest here: Devtoberfest Contest - SAP Community Groups. 

The table below shows you the points you can earn in the fourth and last week of Devtoberfest! Each activity will earn you a badge applied to your SAP Community ID and points that you can track on the “for fun only” Devtoberfest Gameboard. The scavenger hunt is also back this year! The tutorials, quizzes and fun activities to earn even more points as part of the scavenger hunt are also posted below. Completing the entire scavenger hunt will earn you an extra 500 points! 

LIST OF ACTIVITIES FOR WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3

List of activities for contest week 4: 

Day 

Badge Code 

Content Week 4 

Points 

Monday 9/10 

#90EE90 

Introductory talk/demo on development workflow and tools for CAP Java 

300 

Monday 

#EEC591 

Custom Code Adaptation to SAP S/4HANA and ABAP Cloud 

300 

Monday 

#FF1493 

Explore ABAP Profiling with the ABAP Development Tools 

300 

Monday 

#DB7093 

Cloud API Enablement on SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private editions  

300 

Monday 

#4EEE94 

Set Up SAP Business Application Studio for CAP Java 

200 

Monday 

#CD8C95 

Add a Custom Event Handler 

100 

Monday 

#CDAF95 

Create a Reusable Service 

200 

Monday 

#FF3E96 

Reuse a CAP Java Service 

200 

Tuesday 10/10 

#CDBA96 

Real Governance for SAP Build 

300 

Tuesday 

#98FB98 

Will No-Code Work for My Use Case? Run the “Use Case Evaluator” 

300 

Tuesday 

#778899 

Demystifying SAP Build Work Zone 

300 

Tuesday 

#00FA9A 

Set Up SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Using a Trial Account 

50 

Tuesday 

#9AFF9A 

Create a Site Using SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

50 

Tuesday 

#9BCD9B

100 

Tuesday 

#FFD39B

150 

Tuesday 

#CD919E

150 

Wednesday 11/10 

#03A89E

300 

Wednesday 

#CDB79E

300 

Wednesday 

#F8F8FF

300 

Wednesday 

#EE799F 

The Use Case for the Mission 

100 

Wednesday 

#54FF9F

250 

Wednesday

150 

Wednesday

200 

Wednesday

300 

Wednesday

100 

Thursday 12/10 

#EE6AA7

300 

Thursday 

#20B2AA

300 

Thursday 

#66CDAA

50 

Thursday

150

200 

Friday

300 

Friday

300 

Friday

300 

Friday

FunFriday

Trivia Night 

500 points for the winner! 

 

As promised here is the list of the scavenger hunt! 

#FFE4B5 

Scavenger Hunt Completion Bonus 

500 

#EED5B7 

Use an Invoice Object Recommendation (IOR) Dataset Schema to Upload Training Data to Data Attribute Recommendation 

150 

#EEA9B8 

Use the Invoice Object Recommendation (IOR) Business Blueprint to Train a Machine Learning Model 

150

200

400

400

400

400

200

150

175 

Famtoberfest

400 

Desktoberfest 

Desktoberfest - UPDATED 

400 

#BDFCC9

150 

#FFC0CB

100 

#9932CC

150

150 

#EEDFCC

150 

#0000CD 

Install the MultiApps Cloud Foundry CLI Plugin 

50 

#CD00CD 

Get Ready for UI5-Development on Your Local Machine 

50 

#7D26CD

50 

#9A32CD 

Create an App for SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

100 

#B452CD

200 

#6959CD 

Add Rich Enterprise Controls to the User Interface 

250 

#E6E6FA

200 

#FFBBFF 

Create Sales Order Business Process 

450 

#00BFFF 

Run the Sales Order Business Process 

100 

#87CEFF 

Add Links to Forms 

250 

 

We will have many existing tutorials from https://developers.sap.com that you can complete to earn points in Devtoberfest 2023. Each week we will announce the tutorials that go along with that week’s daily topics which you can complete for points. However, we didn't want to penalize those of you that might have already completed these tutorials in the past. Therefore, if you are registered for Devtoberfest and completed these key tutorials in the past you are granted credit automatically for those.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 2
entry.content:
@manuish02 For which tutorial did you receive the error?

@wommel I will post the material for next week tomorrow and I included two new tutorials for the integration track to make up for the mesh tutorials! Sorry about that!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1
entry.content:
@Gungz: Yes, you can earn points throughout the entire 4 week period! Only the fun activities are closed by the end of each week!

@VijayCR: Unfortunately, I cannot give you the answers but feel free to reach out to the host of the session for clarification on the question/topic!

entry.title: Famtoberfest - this year as part of the Scavenger Hunt!
entry.content:
The contest is officially closed!

Many of you have asked us for a Babytoberfest! So here it is: #Famtoberfest: a lighthearted way to share pics of your family and earn extra points for the Devtoberfest Contest!

Here's what you have to do:

Step 1: Take a picture of your family, baby or other family member

Step 2: Post that picture here as a comment in this discussion post, or, if you've already posted it elsewhere, on social media or similar, share the link to that item here in the comments.

entry.title: Desktoberfest - this year as part of the Scavenger Hunt!
entry.content:
The contest is officially closed!

A lot of you have already posted your workstation in the #Petoberfest discussion! We want to see more! How do you like to work? Where do you do your calls? Do you have a home office setup or do you prefer the office?

Here's what you have to do:

Step 1: Take a picture of your desk, workstation, home office setup, workation🌴

Step 2: Post that picture here as a comment in this discussion post, or, if you've already posted it elsewhere, on social media or similar, share the link to that item here in the comments.

I usually move around in the apartment to work in different places until I end up in my home office. My first coffee and mails or early calls I like to do here:

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 3 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content: @VladiE: Sure:) The scavenger hunt completion bonus are points awarded to you in case you finished all tutorials in the scavenger hunt. It will be assigned automatically by us.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1 AND WEEK 2
entry.content:
@VladiE: The points for Game Night will be assigned in the next couple of days. It is a manual process and therefore not as fast as the other badges/points.

@vivekprabhu13: Where are you getting that error? On the SAP Community or the tutorial system?

@SMaaLL@harsh_itaverma: Thank you for pointing that out! Please try again at 16:00 CEST. The badges should be updated by then.

@Former Member: Are you using the same user id as in the profile that your badges are assigned to? Gameboard infos.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 4 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content: @SMaaLL: Thank you for pointing that out! We are on it and we will assign the badge to you as soon as possible!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3
entry.content: @harsh_itaverma, @Julio, @SMaaLL: I am so sorry about the delay! We are working on the issue. Some badges didn't get triggered properly but we are resolving it and you will get the badges as soon as possible!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 4 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content:
@VladiE:

  1. Thank you so much for catching that! The badges have unique names in the system, so the points wouldn't have been affected but we now changed the badge picture in order to prevent any confusion 🙂 I will also change it in the list above to match the new badge: #F8F8FF
  2. Your badge should be assigned in the next couple of days!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3
entry.content:
@SMaaLL: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2023-week3-data-ai-ethics-interview.html

To everyone else missing badges: You should receive them in the next couple of days. Thank you all for your support in pointing these out!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3
entry.content: @SMaaLL: That session was not included in the contest. I am sorry for any confusion!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 4 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content: @mischarf: Scavenger hunt is still accessible in week 4! All the links you need are in the second table of this blog post! Make sure to take part in #Desktoberfest and #Famtoberfest! That's a lot of easy points 😉

entry.title: Re: Famtoberfest - this year as part of the Scavenger Hunt!
entry.content: Congratulations you two! That's a beautiful photo!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3
entry.content: @SyambabuAllu, @SandipAgarwalla: Thank you for pointing out the badges that are causing issues for you! We are working on it! Please recheck your badges and let me know if they are still causing problems!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 4 and the SCAVENGER HUNT
entry.content: @harsh_itaverma: Thank you so much for letting us know! We are working on it! Please recheck your badges and let me know 🙂

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Contest Activities and Points - WEEK 1, WEEK 2 AND WEEK 3
entry.content: @SyambabuAllu, @gphadnis2000: Those two badges will be assigned to you today! I was waiting for the contest to close, not to leave out anyone posting late last night 🙂 I hope all the other badges are now assigned?

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2023 - Wrap Up
entry.content:
Once again Devtoberfest and with it four weeks of fun and learning is over! Thank you all so much for your participation, your curiosity, creativity and your amazing photos during Petoberfest, Foodtoberfest, Famtoberfest and Desktoberfest! I can’t tell you how much we as Developer Adovcates enjoy this time of year where we can truly connect with all of you and share our passion! It is wonderful to see how strong the SAP Community is and how much we can achieve together! It is great to see participation from so much of the SAP Developer Community!

We had over 50.000 participants this year following this year’s topics:

  • Monday: 🟢 ABAP & CAP 
  • Tuesday: 🟣 SAP Build / Low- and No- Code 
  • Wednesday: 🔴 Integration 
  • Thursday: 🔵 Data, Analytics, & AI 
  • Friday: 🟠 Frontend 
  • And of course, 🟡 FunFriday! 

Some of my highlights: 

  1. September 18th, 2023 – on the first day of Devtoberfest the SAP Developers Youtube Channel had 9,933 views more views than any other day during Devtoberfest!  
  2. The sessions 🟢 Overview of ABAP Cloud, 🟢 ABAP Cloud for Classic ABAP Developers and 🟢 How to Clean your ABAP code in Seconds with ABAP Cleaner each already have more than 5000 views! 
  3. Don’t even get me started on 🟡 Petoberfest! - How cute are your pets? I loved all the pictures! Turtles, (baby) dogs, (baby) cats, fish, birds, rabbits! Thank you for sharing! 
  4. Famtoberfest – Nico our very own Developer Advocate took part and shared the newest member of the team! Congratulations Nico!
  5. 🟡 Foodtoberfest – Josh shared a cooking video! I will definitely try that myself! Fun fact: Şakşuka is my favorite dish from Turkey, where it is a totally different dish!
  6. Desktoberfest – How cute is your dog, @aancos_id2?

     

  7. Daniel’s Cryptic Crossword! - So much love and effort went into designing the puzzles and quizzes that @thecodester shared with us this year! Thank you! 
  8. 🟡 How Did I Miss That? - @josh_bentley's question: What is the highest number between 1 and a million that does NOT contain the letter “N” (1 = one)? Share your answer in the comments! 
  9. The prizes! - A trip to SAP’s Newport Beach office in California, a call with Jürgen Müller, and many more! Winners to be announced at TechEd! 
  10. What was your highlight? Share it in the comments! 

Some statistics from this year!

We had a lot of viewers from around the world, but here are the highest-ranking cities that you watched sessions from: 
 

Devtoberfest 2023 viewers by city (top 5) 

 

Bengaluru is again first place and also ABAP is clearly winning the most watched topic! 

Devtoberfest 2023 top watched videos 

And sorry @josh_bentley but Playstation lost a lot of views! But who would have thought that SmartTV outranks Lunix this year? 

Devtoberfest 2023 views by operating system 

Thank you all for making the past four weeks so remarkable! Make sure to register for TechEd! Winners will be announced at TechEd right after the Developer Keynote!

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2023 - Wrap Up
entry.content: @rcaziraghi: Thank you so much! It was amazing to see how much the community enjoyed the event!
